title: dichrocephala chrysanthemifolia var. alpina
intro: Dichrocephala chrysanthemifolia var. alpina, also known as 'Alpine Dichrocephala', is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese and Ayurvedic systems, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dichrocephala chrysanthemifolia var. alpina include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve overall well-being. Traditionally, it is prepared as an infusion or decoction for medicinal purposes, and its leaves, flowers, and roots are used for herbal preparations.
